title: LEVEL 01
subTitle: Functional
desc: Deep manual logic testing. Your users get exactly what you promised in the specs.

title: LEVEL 02
subTitle: Automation
desc: Writing regression auto-tests (CI/CD). Fast releases without the fear of "breaking things".

title: LEVEL 03
subTitle: Security
desc: Vulnerability scanning and penetration testing. Protection against data leaks and loss.

title: LEVEL 04
subTitle: Load ＆ Stress
desc: Simulating peak loads. Your product stays stable during massive user traffic surges.
